summary: Pitch‑off, slow soundboard recording of a shaky 1978 show; only the Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World sequence shines.
review: The Miller SBD suffers from noticeable pitch drift, missing vocal tracks and monitor problems that make the performance feel even more sluggish. Musically the concert is riddled with limp renditions – “Promised Land”, “Loser” and “Stagger Lee” are highlighted as train‑wrecks – but a few moments like the Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World segue, a solid Big River and an energetic Sugar Magnolia provide brief relief.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; it rates the show at ~1½ stars and flags serious recording flaws, leading to a low combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Runs slow with pitch errors (+2 % then +1 %), missing vocal track on Friend of the Devil (matrix needed), monitor problems on Promised Land, overall muddy and draggy.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is fragmented and often limp; many songs sound confused or lifeless, with only a few bright spots providing any momentum.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Adds chiming arpeggios on Estimated Prophet but loses the thread on Terrapin and other songs due to monitor issues.
